description_long: This object is a highly stylized, fantasy-inspired crustacean with a muscular, humanoid upper body and a dark, glossy exoskeleton. Its skin is a deep maroon, almost black, with fiery orange and red accents along the forearms and horns, giving it a demonic appearance. The forearms are adorned with flame-like patterns, and the hands are large with pronounced claws. The lower body features thick, armored legs ending in hoof-like feet, and the back is broad and powerful. Two large, curved horns protrude from the head, and the face is partially obscured by armor. The overall form is robust and intimidating, suggesting a creature of great strength.
description: A muscular, demonic-looking crustacean with a dark maroon exoskeleton, fiery accents, large claws, and prominent horns. Its body is heavily armored and visually striking.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the broad, muscular back, curved horns, and the symmetrical layout of the arms and legs.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the flame-patterned forearm, the curvature of the horns, and the robust, armored legs.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the imposing chest, large claws, and the menacing facial armor with horns.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, emphasizing the detailed arm and leg armor and the fiery accents.
